payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the active/current memory for the Sam-from-Goldman context. mem_old was excluded because it has been superseded by mem_new; superseded memories may remain in history for audit/debug purposes but should not be surfaced as current facts.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall context identifies Sam with the Goldman affiliation; no durable entity ID was provided in the prompt.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching the query about Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as a current fact.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present mem_old as a current fact.

repair_options: If mem_old should still be valid, remove or revise its superseded link to mem_new.
If mem_new is incorrect, mark mem_new deleted or superseded and promote the correct replacement memory.
If both memories refer to different Sams from Goldman, split or disambiguate the entities before recall.
